cases.prompt: 유아부터 90대까지 페르소나 시뮬 돌려서 우리 온보딩 누가 막히는지 봐줘

assertions.text: Requires real screen code to exist and stops to ask for the path if none is found (no code = opinion piece)
Builds a 4-axis persona matrix (age band, job/situation, income, culture/country) with corner cases
Walks first-run + core loop and flags blocker/dropout/distrust/confusion grounded in file:line code citations

cases.prompt: run a persona simulation diversity audit on these screens and tell me who gets stuck

assertions.text: Forces each persona through both the first-run path and the core loop, not all features
Aggregates findings by frequency (affected personas) x severity (P0..P3) to prioritize

cases.prompt: 페르소나 검증 결과를 코드 근거 리포트로 만들어줘

assertions.text: Produces a self-contained HTML findings report (3 colors max, no slop) with the persona matrix and prioritized findings
Includes per-AI routing suggestions and a machine-readable queue block for the findings
